meta-description: Learn about dividends by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: Dividend
excerpt: A payment made by a for-profit corporation to its shareholders. This payment is a portion of the corporate earnings and may be paid a certain number of times each year (like each quarter).
content: A payment made by a for-profit corporation to its shareholders. This payment is a portion of the corporate earnings and may be paid a certain number of times each year (like each quarter).
